nodes.name: Watch Content Folder
nodes.notes: Watches your local content folder for new files. Set CONTENT_WATCH_FOLDER in your .env

nodes.name: Generate Captions (GPT-4o)
nodes.notes: Replace [YOUR_PLATFORM] with your actual platform. Load voice brief from persona.json (gitignored).

parameters.body:
={{ '📸 New content ready

' + $json.fileName + '

Option 1: ' + $json.captions.option1 + '

Option 2: ' + $json.captions.option2 + '

Option 3: ' + $json.captions.option3 + '

Reply: Y1 / Y2 / Y3 to post | N to skip | E to write your own' }}

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Approval
nodes.notes: Sends preview + 3 caption options to your WhatsApp for approval.

nodes.name: Receive WhatsApp Reply
nodes.notes: Receives Y1/Y2/Y3/N/E reply from Twilio. Expose via ngrok: https://YOUR_NGROK_URL/webhook/approval-handler

nodes.name: Post to Platform
nodes.notes: Replace with your target platform API. LinkedIn, Instagram, Threads, Medium — each has its own endpoint. See docs/setup-guide.md.

_meta.note: This is a REFERENCE workflow — it shows the architecture. All credentials are in environment variables. All persona-specific config (voice brief, content rules, folder paths) lives in gitignored local files. Import this into n8n and adapt to your setup. See docs/setup-guide.md for the full walkthrough.
